meaning: HLS色彩模型(Hue 色度,Lightness 亮度,Saturation 饱和度)
examples: In 1872, Langdell introduced the Socratic Method to HLS.
The HLS digital TBF system is based on the TED digital feedback processor.
The test shows that HLS outperforms in both position precision and energy consumption.
The new app doesn't use Flash, given its absence on most up-to-date versions of Google's mobile OS, instead using HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) to deliver your weekly doses of Doctor Who.
